summary.stack: Next.js (App + Pages Router) on Netlify Edge + Cloudflare, Brotli
top_findings: Sitemap lists /blog at priority 0.9 but page is noindex+503
Blog has no live posts (blog.md: 'No posts found')
quick_wins: Remove /blog from sitemap until live (or fix 503/noindex)

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: HTTP->HTTPS and www->apex redirects (1 hop each)
robots.txt disallows app/admin/auth, allows AI crawlers, declares sitemap

findings.title: /blog returns HTTP 503
findings.description: Reproducible across 3 requests with Retry-After: 3600 and no X-Nextjs headers; fails at data/SSR layer (likely external blog API vierra-server.vercel.app).
findings.recommendation: Degrade gracefully to a 200 empty-state page instead of 503.

findings.title: Sitemap vs index conflict on /blog
findings.description: /blog is in sitemap.xml (priority 0.9, daily) but emits noindex,nofollow and 503.
findings.recommendation: Remove /blog from sitemap until live, or fix the 503 and drop noindex once posts exist.

findings.title: Mixed Next.js routers
findings.description: Homepage/careers use App Router; /blog uses Pages Router.
findings.recommendation: Consolidate routing to reduce regression risk.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: E-E-A-T signals: named clients, testimonial authors, leadership team, foundingDate

findings.title: Empty blog
findings.description: blog.md returns 'No posts found.' Zero topical content published.
findings.recommendation: Publish 3-5 cornerstone articles (case studies, lead-gen guides).

findings.title: Thin homepage body (~635 words)
findings.description: Acceptable for a landing page but limits keyword coverage.
findings.recommendation: Add substantive query-targeted copy or supporting pages.

findings.title: Duplicate 'How Does It Work?' h2
findings.description: Two identical h2 headings render on the homepage.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: JobPosting + BreadcrumbList on career pages with salary, employmentType, jobLocation

findings.title: JobPosting missing validThrough
findings.description: Google for Jobs recommends an expiry date.

findings.title: Verify LocalBusiness accuracy
findings.description: Vierra reads as a B2B service, not a walk-in location.
findings.recommendation: Confirm address/geo/telephone or narrow to ProfessionalService.

findings.title: Field data unavailable
findings.description: PageSpeed Insights API returned 429 (no API key); CrUX/lab metrics not retrieved.
findings.recommendation: Confirm CWV via GSC or configure a PSI/CrUX API key (seo-google).

findings.title: Heavy images inflate transfer
findings.description: meta-banner.png 1.26MB; PNG team photos ~206KB even after next/image.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: Per-page .md mirrors advertised via Link: alternate header
AI crawlers explicitly allowed in robots.txt

findings.title: Citable content is shallow
findings.description: Excellent GEO infrastructure but little substantive content to cite while the blog is empty.
findings.recommendation: Publish articles to realize the GEO foundation.

findings.title: Michael.png 404s on production
findings.description: Matches uncommitted working tree (Team.tsx modified, Michael.png untracked).
findings.recommendation: Commit/deploy the asset with the Team change.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Resolve sitemap vs noindex conflict on /blog

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Build topic clusters once posts exist
